query: motion blur photograph long exposure subject in motion
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / intentional_blur: motion blur, long exposure subject motion - artistic streaks and dynamic blur

response.objective_caption: A centered radial composition of blue and dark purple light beams converging toward a vanishing point at the middle of the frame, creating a starburst or tunnel-like pattern with alternating light and dark wedges expanding outward in eight symmetrical segments.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract radial blur of blue and dark purple light beams with no discernible subject, the entire image dissolving into soft, indistinct wedges of color that lack any fine detail or recognizable forms, creating a hypnotic vortex where all texture and specificity has been lost to smooth color gradients.
